sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96545" key="steremniw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στερεμνι-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n96545.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of solid nature</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.49.50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
